subcodes.first_line: O faithful servant of the Blessed Beauty! Thy letter dated 22 Muharram 1330 was received and perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق جمال مبارک نامه بیست و دوم محرم ۱۳۳۰ وصول یافت و ملاحظه گردید و
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
